positive: A stunning, vibrant celestial forest scene. Central composition features silhouetted mythic creatures (e.g., stylized deer, soaring phoenix, gentle owl) amidst glowing, bioluminescent flora. The style is high-detail neo-fantasy illustration combined with Art Nouveau elements. Strong contrast between deep indigo and midnight blue backgrounds and pops of vibrant neon emerald, gold, and amethyst light emanating from flowers and magical orbs. Cinematic volumetric lighting, highly detailed composition suitable for a repeat pattern or central apparel print. Clean lines, vector aesthetic finish, intricate filigree details.
negative: blurry, ugly, deformed, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, cropped, out of focus, logo, trademark
